initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT i_category, SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
